chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 304 of 2021 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.2863/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh has filed statement, which is taken on record. None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Record shows that since 2021 none one has pursued this petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
